# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to claude-statusline!

## How to contribute

1. Fork the repository
2. Create your branch from `main`:
   ```bash
   git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name
   ```
3. Make your changes
4. Open a PR to `develop` (not `main`)

## Branch flow

```
feature/* → develop → main
```

- PRs to `develop` do not require approval
- PRs to `main` require 1 approval and must come from `develop`

## Rules

- Do not push directly to `main` or `develop`
- Keep PRs focused — one feature or fix per PR
- Write clear commit messages
- Test your changes before opening a PR
